summary: Game Data - Live - Hide Spoilers ON

steps.action: WHEN an in-progress live game is present in the Hero
steps.result:
THEN the current away team score is NOT displayed
AND the current home team score is NOT displayed
AND the current inning data is NOT displayed
AND the current base runners data is NOT displayed
AND the current balls-strikes data is NOT displayed
AND the current inning Outs data is NOT displayed
